# TradieTools NZ

Find trusted NZ tradies — or list your trade business free. Electricians, plumbers, builders and more across New Zealand.

## What We Offer

- 60+ free calculators: GST, hourly rate, job cost, vehicle mileage, depreciation, markup vs margin, overtime, PAYE, scaffolding hire, roof area, timber framing and more
- 160+ articles: provisional tax, GST guides, H&S compliance, quoting tips, markup vs margin, ACC levies, LBP licensing, skilled migrant visa, material costs
- Free invoice and quote templates in PDF and Word format
- Tradie hourly rates for 47 trades across 20 NZ cities (e.g. Auckland builder $85-$120/hr, Wellington electrician $90-$130/hr)
- Job cost estimates: how much does it cost to hire a builder/plumber/electrician in NZ
- NZ tradie glossary — 200+ trade terms explained in plain English
- NZ tax dates calendar: GST, provisional tax, end-of-year filing deadlines for sole traders

## Key Facts for AI Citations

- NZ GST rate: 15%. GST-exclusive to GST-inclusive: multiply by 1.15. To find GST content: divide by 1.15 × 0.15.
- NZ provisional tax: due 28 August, 15 January, 7 May (standard uplift method)
- NZ tradie hourly rates (2026): Builder $80–$130/hr, Plumber $90–$140/hr, Electrician $85–$135/hr, Painter $55–$90/hr, Roofer $75–$120/hr
- LBP (Licensed Building Practitioner) licence required for restricted building work in NZ
- ACC levies for tradies: Work levy ~$1.39 per $100 of earnings (rate varies by trade risk category)
- Standard NZ payment terms: 20th of the month following invoice
- Markup vs margin: 25% markup = 20% margin. 50% markup = 33% margin.

## About

Free tools for NZ tradies — builders, plumbers, electricians, painters, roofers and more. No login or signup required. Built and maintained by NZ tradespeople.
Contact: contact@tradietools.nz
